description_long: This is a robust wristwatch with a large, round black case and a matching black metal link bracelet. The bezel is marked with bold, white numerals at intervals of ten, and the dial features both 12-hour and 24-hour markings in white and red, with luminous hour and minute hands and a red second hand. The watch face is protected by a clear, glossy crystal, and the crown is positioned on the right side of the case. The bracelet is composed of solid, polished links, giving the watch a substantial and durable appearance. The overall design is sporty and functional, suitable for everyday urban wear. The branding is visible on the dial, adding a touch of identity to the otherwise utilitarian style.
description: A large, black wristwatch with a bold bezel, luminous hands, and a solid metal link bracelet. The dial features both 12-hour and 24-hour markings, with a sporty and durable design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed watch face, bezel numerals, luminous hands, and visible brand logo.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the case, the crown, and the profile of the metal bracelet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the clasp and the segmented metal links of the bracelet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the case profile and bracelet curvature, with the crown less visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, white printed logo with the text 'nile' is located on the upper center of the dial, just below the 12 o'clock marker.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is black with bold white Arabic numerals for the 12-hour format and smaller red numerals for the 24-hour format. The hour and minute hands are luminous, and the second hand is red. The bezel features large, white numerals at 10, 20, 30, 40, 50, and 60, with a sporty, utilitarian style and no subdials or decorative textures.
attribute_strap_type: Solid black metal link bracelet with a polished finish and segmented construction.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three central hands (hour, minute, second), 12-hour and 24-hour markings, and luminous elements for visibility in low light.
